title: Equivalence of Compactness and Sequential Compactness in Metric Spaces
description: A flowchart demonstrating the logical equivalence between the topological definition of compactness (every open cover has a finite subcover) and the sequential definition (every sequence has a convergent subsequence) in the context of metric spaces.
relationships: Def. 1 + Metric Space → Totally Bounded & Complete
Totally Bounded → Every sequence has a Cauchy subsequence
Totally Bounded & Complete + Metric Space → Def. 1
This establishes the equivalence Def. 1 ⇔ Def. 2
